details.description: Sunset seascape on a west-facing tropical shore. The foreground shows gentle waves and rippling water. At right, a dark rocky headland rises steeply, topped with vegetation; near its base is a small natural sea arch or hole where the ocean is visible through the rock. Low, jagged rocks extend from this headland into the water. In the distance to the left are layered silhouettes of hilly coastline and a small offshore islet. The sky grades from pale blue above to warm orange and gold near the horizon with thin clouds, and the sunset glow reflects subtly on the sea.

details.description: Seascape at sunset from a coastal vantage in El Nido. The foreground shows gentle, dark silhouettes of rocky coastal outcrops along a calm sea, with a larger rugged rock formation on the right framing the scene. The horizon reveals distant islets or islands, their shapes softened by atmospheric haze. The sky transitions from pale blue overhead to warm sunset hues near the horizon, with golds, pinks, and oranges illuminating the water’s surface in places. The overall mood is tranquil and silhouette-driven, typical of a tropical shoreline at dusk.

details.description: Sunset seascape from a sandy beach. The foreground shows gentle waves and the silhouette of a jagged rocky headland at right that includes a small sea-arch opening near the waterline. On the horizon to the left sit dark, low islets and a distant headland. The sky grades from pale blue above to warm orange near the horizon, with the sun just set behind the rocks.

details.description: A tranquil seascape at sunset along a rocky coastline. The foreground shows dark-blue water with gentle waves lapping a pebbled shore. In the mid-ground, jagged rock formations extend into the water, with a prominent rocky outcrop on the right. Distant silhouettes of islands rise on the horizon against a gradient sky that shifts from pale blue overhead to warm orange and pink near the horizon. Wispy clouds sweep across the sky, creating a serene and contemplative mood typical of a coastal landscape in Palawan, Philippines.

details.description: A serene seascape captured at sunset or dusk, featuring a calm ocean with gentle ripples in the foreground. The sky displays a soft gradient from pale blue at the top to warm orange and yellow near the horizon, with thin, wispy clouds. Dominating the right side of the composition is the large, dark silhouette of a rocky island or headland, characterized by a rugged profile and vegetation on top. In the distance to the left, fainter silhouettes of other islands or coastal mountains are visible on the horizon line. The scene is backlit, emphasizing the shapes of the landmasses against the colorful sky.

details.description: A vertical shot of a sunset over the ocean in El Nido. In the foreground, dark, rippling water reflects the fading light. The middle ground features several silhouetted rocky islands and landmasses. A prominent dark hill on the right side of the frame shows a small natural arch or hole near the water's edge. The sky displays a gradient of colors, from a soft orange and yellow glow at the horizon where the sun has set, transitioning into pale blue and white towards the top. Thin, wispy clouds are scattered across the sky.

details.description: Coastal sunset scene with silhouetted rocky formations. In the right foreground is a jagged headland or sea stack featuring a small natural sea arch near the waterline and sparse vegetation on top. Across the mid‑distance are low, dark islands with rounded karst-like profiles. The sea is calm with small shore break in the foreground, and the sky shows a gradient from orange near the horizon to pale blue above.

details.description: A tranquil coastal sunset scene featuring calm water with gentle ripples, silhouetted rocky outcrops along the shoreline, and a prominent dark cliff formation on the right topped with sparse vegetation. In the distance, additional sea stacks and island silhouettes create a layered horizon. The sky transitions from pale blue overhead to warm orange and pink hues near the horizon, with soft, wispy clouds. A small opening or arch is hinted at the base of the right-hand rock formation, contributing to the dramatic coastal silhouette. Foreground shows a narrow, shallow shoreline with gentle waves lapping the shore.

details.description: Sunset seascape viewed from a beach. Gentle waves lap the foreground shoreline while the horizon shows calm ocean water. At right, a dark rocky outcrop with sparse vegetation forms a small natural sea arch near the waterline. In the distance to the left are silhouettes of a larger coastal headland and a smaller rocky islet. The sky transitions from pale blue above to warm orange near the horizon with thin clouds.

details.description: A serene coastal seascape at sunset. The sky transitions from pale blue at the top to warm oranges near the horizon. Silhouetted rocky outcrops dominate the right side of the scene, with smaller rocks in the foreground and along the waterline. Distant landmasses and a small island appear as hazy silhouettes on the horizon. The water is calm with gentle ripples reflecting the sunset hues.

details.description: A vertical seascape photograph capturing a serene sunset over calm waters. The sky features a smooth gradient from pale blue at the top to warm yellow and orange hues near the horizon, with faint wisps of clouds. In the foreground, the sea surface is textured with gentle, rhythmic ripples reflecting the ambient light. Dominating the right mid-ground is a large, dark silhouette of a rocky island or headland (likely Depeldet Island) with a jagged profile topped with vegetation and a small visible gap or arch near the waterline. On the distant left horizon, the silhouette of another mountainous island (resembling the profile of islands in the Bacuit Archipelago) rises from the sea. The overall mood is tranquil and atmospheric.

details.description: A vertical photograph capturing a sunset over a coastal landscape. In the foreground, dark, rippling ocean water meets a sandy shore at the very bottom edge. The midground features several silhouetted islands and rock formations across the horizon. On the right, a large, dark, craggy rock formation dominates the view, featuring a small natural arch or hole near the water level. The sky transitions from a deep blue at the top to soft yellow and orange near the horizon where the sun has set. Wispy, horizontal clouds are scattered across the sky, catching the last light.
